allow: Bash(xargs -I{} sh -c "echo ""=== {} ==="" && python3 -c ""import json,sys; d=json.load\(open\(sys.argv[1]\)\); arr=d.get\("""arrivals""",[]\) or []; print\(json.dumps\(arr[:2], indent=2, ensure_ascii=False\)\)"" {}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); for\(const s of [''cercanias'',''ave-larga-distancia'']\){try{const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''/d/Workroot/renfe-enhora/public/data/''+s+''/history.json''\)\); const r=d.records||[]; console.log\(s+'': ''+r.length+'' registros''\); if\(r.length\) console.log\(''ultimo:'',JSON.stringify\(r[r.length-1]\)\); }catch\(e\){console.log\(s+'': ERROR ''+e.message\);}}")
